Here is the list of signs at $line, along with their scores and descriptions:
1. Aries - 7/10 - A natural-born leader, Aries can sometimes be impulsive and reckless.
2. Taurus - 8/10 - Reliable and practical, but can be stubborn and resistant to change.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Quick-witted and adaptable, Geminis are often easy-going and communicative.
4. Cancer - 6/10 - Emotional and nurturing, Cancers can be moody and overly attached to loved ones.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, Leos can sometimes be prideful and dominating.
6. Virgo - 9/10 - Analytical and hardworking, Virgos are often perfectionistic and critical of themselves and others.
7. Libra - 8/10 - Diplomatic and social, Librans are often indecisive and people-pleasing.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpios can be secretive and vengeful when hurt.
9. Sagittarius - 8/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians can be blunt and tactless at times.
10. Capricorn - 7/10 - Ambitious and responsible, Capricorns can be overly serious and critical of themselves and others.
11. Aquarius - 9/10 - Humanitarian and independent, Aquarians are often rebellious and nonconformist.
12. Pisces - 6/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, Pisces can be dreamy and easily influenced by their emotions.
Note that these scores are subjective and based on general astrological interpretations.
